creator: @trainermikeyy
transcript: If you're at a Papa John's right now, I'm gonna show you how to make the lowest calorie pizza if you're still on your diet. I'm gonna grab this and I'm gonna order a pizza, small. Can I do gluten-free? Yeah, please. Original sauce with light cheese. What's the eight-inch? Isn't that personal? That something else? All right. I'll just do that then. No toppings, just light cheese. Just got the pizza, you guys. Came out to a total of, with the Pepsi, $16.51. Gluten-free crust is 90 calories. That's the lowest crust here. Light cheese was 35 calories with two grams of protein. Original sauce, 10 calories. And then this is all for a total of 810 calories, 24 grams of protein. So there's six slices. Each slice, 135 calories with four grams of protein. Enjoy you guys.
caption:
Papa John's Pizza On a Diet🍕
#papajohns #pizza #diet #lowcalorie #reels
ocr_summary: PAPA JOHN'S PIZZA | Lowest Calorie Pizza | Gluten-Free Crust | Light cheese | Original sauce | No toppings | Total: 810 calories whole pizza, 24g protein | Per slice: ~135 calories, 4g protein (6 slices)
visual_scenes: Man outside Papa John's talking to camera, goes inside to order at counter, comes back outside with pizza box. Shows nutrition facts overlay: 810 cal, 30g fat, 24g protein for whole pizza.
